message.content: Port mismatch confirmed. The wrapper erroneously connects JTAG ports (`tck/tms/tdi/trst_n`) while `compute_ss` uses SWD (`swclk/swdi/swdo/swdo_en`). All JTAG ports were being tied to constants, so the functional impact is identical — the fix is to swap them. Applying the minimal surgical correction to unblock synthesis.

function.arguments:
{"command": "str_replace", "path": "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v", "old_str": "// Compute subsystem instantiation
mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss u_core (
    .clk(clk_in),
    .reset_n(reset_n_xres_h_n),
    .tck(1'b0),
    .tms(1'b0),
    .tdi(1'b0),
    .trst_n(1'b0),
    .qspi_sck(),", "new_str": "// Compute subsystem instantiation
// NOTE (PnR fix): wrapper was generated with JTAG ports (tck/tms/tdi/trst_n)
// but compute_ss uses SWD (swclk/swdi/swdo/swdo_en). Replaced with correct SWD
// port connections; debug inputs are tied-off as no SWD pad exists in this wrapper.
mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss u_core (
    .clk(clk_in),
    .reset_n(reset_n_xres_h_n),
    .swclk(1'b0),
    .swdi(1'b0),
    .swdo(),
    .swdo_en(),
    .halted(),
    .qspi_sck(),"}
function.name: str_replace_editor

args.thought: Port mismatch confirmed. The wrapper erroneously connects JTAG ports (`tck/tms/tdi/trst_n`) while `compute_ss` uses SWD (`swclk/swdi/swdo/swdo_en`). All JTAG ports were being tied to constants, so the functional impact is identical — the fix is to swap them. Applying the minimal surgical correction to unblock synthesis.
